logs.content: **Hello! 👋**, I'm **Agent Zero**, your AI assistant. How can I help you today?

logs.heading: A0: Starting Jira sync script execution
logs.content:
{

        "The user wants me to run a Jira sync script that takes 5-15 minutes.",
        "I need to execute the script in the background and monitor its progress every 30 seconds up to 10 times.",
        "After completion (or failure), I must send a notification with the results.",
        "The script output will be logged to /a0/usr/workdir/jira-debug.log.",

    ],

    "tool_name": "code_execution_tool",
    "tool_args": {
        "runtime": "terminal",
        "session": 1,
        "reset": true,
        "code": "python /a0/usr/skills/jira/scripts/jira_reader.py --filter-id 13811 --view-id 10489904 > /a0/usr/workdir/jira-debug.log 2>&1 &\necho \"Jira sync started with PID $!\""
    }
}

thoughts: The user wants me to run a Jira sync script that takes 5-15 minutes.
I need to execute the script in the background and monitor its progress every 30 seconds up to 10 times.
After completion (or failure), I must send a notification with the results.
The script output will be logged to /a0/usr/workdir/jira-debug.log.
I'll start by running the Python script and then set up monitoring.
